case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC VS. CALVIN J MOORE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE ON CALVIN J MOORE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-26-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST MARK D. WALSH, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-26-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-10-2009. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARIA LERTORA CSR# 11935 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-26-2009 CONTINUED TO NOV-04-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, CALVIN J DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-29-2009
AFFIDAVIT OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-26-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-04-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR OBJECTION FILED, THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-04-2009 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor objection filed, the court ordered the case dismissed. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Continued To Nov-04-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
